message:
perf(tests): replace direct git init with newGitRepo template in init_test.go, consolidate template_test.go (bd-ktng)

init_test.go: 6 direct git init calls → newGitRepo template copies.
template_test.go: 4 DB-using tests merged into TestTemplateSuite (5→2 stores).
